overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style game, following a character with an umbrella through a rainy, neon-lit futuristic city. The character walks along covered sidewalks and underpasses with digital billboards, flying vehicles, and dense pedestrian traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with digital advertising screens

events.description: character in red jacket passes close to camera on the left
slight turn to navigate around pedestrian with red umbrella

agents.ego_description: following the man in the yellow plaid shirt holding a black umbrella along the covered sidewalk

notable_agents.action: man in yellow plaid shirt walking with black umbrella
woman in red dress with long dark hair walking ahead

entered.detail: tall wall with multiple glowing digital advertisements separating sidewalk from street
massive concrete structure with vertical windows and industrial texture
futuristic cars hovering above the street beyond the billboard wall

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-slicked covered sidewalk lined with glowing digital billboards on the left and a massive concrete building on the right. The camera follows a man with a yellow plaid shirt and umbrella through sparse pedestrian traffic, with flying vehicles visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass beneath elevated highway with traffic barriers

events.description: entering the covered underpass beneath the elevated highway structure
blue sports car and yellow van pass by on the street to the left

agents.ego_description: continuing to follow the umbrella-holding character deeper into the underpass, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: small child in green jacket walking alongside the main group
blue sports car driving on the wet street under the overpass

entered.detail: underside of the elevated highway creating a roof over the walkway
yellow and concrete barriers separating sidewalk from the street
illuminated sign indicating pedestrian crossing ahead

segments.scene_description: Transitioning into the covered underpass beneath an elevated highway, where massive concrete pillars line the right side and traffic barriers separate the walkway from the street. The lighting becomes more artificial and dimmer as a blue sports car passes on the left, and the group approaches a pedestrian crossing sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed pedestrian tunnel with crosswalk and heavy foot traffic

events.description: approaching and crossing the pedestrian crosswalk under the tunnel
entering darker section of the underpass with greenish artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: navigating through the crowded underpass while crossing the street and following the group ahead

notable_agents.action: woman in blue nurse uniform walking in opposite direction
group of pedestrians with umbrellas walking ahead in the tunnel

entered.detail: smooth concrete walls of the deep underpass with industrial details
black metal railing along the right side of the walkway
overhead fluorescent lights illuminating the dark tunnel

segments.scene_description: Walking through the darker, enclosed tunnel section of the underpass with dense pedestrian traffic moving in both directions. The environment is lit by overhead fluorescent lights as the character passes a pedestrian crossing sign and navigates through crowds, with metal fences lining the concrete walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked open sidewalk into the increasingly enclosed and artificial environment of a city underpass. It begins by following a man in a yellow plaid shirt with an umbrella along a walkway lined with glowing digital billboards and a massive concrete building, with flying vehicles drifting in the distance. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts into a covered underpass beneath an elevated highway, where the light dims and massive concrete pillars emerge on the right while a blue sports car speeds past on the left. The environment then tightens into a darker, enclosed tunnel section lit by overhead fluorescent lights, where the camera navigates through dense pedestrian traffic and past metal fences lining the concrete walls.
